1//===-- MSP430MCInstLower.cpp - Convert MSP430 MachineInstr to an MCInst --===//
2//
3// The LLVM Compiler Infrastructure
4//
5// This file is distributed under the University of Illinois Open Source
6// License. See LICENSE.TXT for details.
7//
8//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
9//
10// This file contains code to lower MSP430 MachineInstrs to their corresponding
11// MCInst records.
12//
13//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
14
15#include "MSP430MCInstLower.h"
16#include "llvm/ADT/SmallString.h"
17#include "llvm/CodeGen/AsmPrinter.h"
18#include "llvm/CodeGen/MachineBasicBlock.h"
19#include "llvm/CodeGen/MachineInstr.h"
20#include "llvm/IR/DataLayout.h"
21#include "llvm/IR/Mangler.h"
22#include "llvm/MC/MCAsmInfo.h"
23#include "llvm/MC/MCContext.h"
24#include "llvm/MC/MCExpr.h"
25#include "llvm/MC/MCInst.h"
26#include "llvm/Support/ErrorHandling.h"
27#include "llvm/Support/raw_ostream.h"
28#include "llvm/Target/TargetMachine.h"
29#include "llvm/Target/TargetSubtargetInfo.h"
30using namespace llvm;
31
32MCSymbol *MSP430MCInstLower::
33GetGlobalAddressSymbol(const MachineOperand &MO) const {
34 switch (MO.getTargetFlags()) {
35 default: llvm_unreachable("Unknown target flag on GV operand");
36 case 0: break;
37 }
38
39 return Printer.getSymbol(MO.getGlobal());
40}
41
42MCSymbol *MSP430MCInstLower::
43GetExternalSymbolSymbol(const MachineOperand &MO) const {
44 switch (MO.getTargetFlags()) {
45 default: llvm_unreachable("Unknown target flag on GV operand");
46 case 0: break;
47 }
48
49 return Printer.GetExternalSymbolSymbol(MO.getSymbolName());
50}
51
52MCSymbol *MSP430MCInstLower::
53GetJumpTableSymbol(const MachineOperand &MO) const {
54 const DataLayout *DL = Printer.TM.getSubtargetImpl()->getDataLayout();
55 SmallString<256> Name;
56 raw_svector_ostream(Name) << DL->getPrivateGlobalPrefix() << "JTI"
57 << Printer.getFunctionNumber() << '_'
58 << MO.getIndex();
59
60 switch (MO.getTargetFlags()) {
61 default: llvm_unreachable("Unknown target flag on GV operand");
62 case 0: break;
63 }
64
65 // Create a symbol for the name.
66 return Ctx.GetOrCreateSymbol(Name.str());
67}
68
69MCSymbol *MSP430MCInstLower::
70GetConstantPoolIndexSymbol(const MachineOperand &MO) const {
71 const DataLayout *DL = Printer.TM.getSubtargetImpl()->getDataLayout();
72 SmallString<256> Name;
73 raw_svector_ostream(Name) << DL->getPrivateGlobalPrefix() << "CPI"
74 << Printer.getFunctionNumber() << '_'
75 << MO.getIndex();
76
77 switch (MO.getTargetFlags()) {
78 default: llvm_unreachable("Unknown target flag on GV operand");
79 case 0: break;
80 }
81
82 // Create a symbol for the name.
83 return Ctx.GetOrCreateSymbol(Name.str());
84}
85
86MCSymbol *MSP430MCInstLower::
87GetBlockAddressSymbol(const MachineOperand &MO) const {
88 switch (MO.getTargetFlags()) {
89 default: llvm_unreachable("Unknown target flag on GV operand");
90 case 0: break;
91 }
92
93 return Printer.GetBlockAddressSymbol(MO.getBlockAddress());
94}
95
96MCOperand MSP430MCInstLower::
97LowerSymbolOperand(const MachineOperand &MO, MCSymbol *Sym) const {
98 // FIXME: We would like an efficient form for this, so we don't have to do a
99 // lot of extra uniquing.
100 const MCExpr *Expr = MCSymbolRefExpr::Create(Sym, Ctx);
101
102 switch (MO.getTargetFlags()) {
103 default: llvm_unreachable("Unknown target flag on GV operand");
104 case 0: break;
105 }
106
107 if (!MO.isJTI() && MO.getOffset())
108 Expr = MCBinaryExpr::CreateAdd(Expr,
109 MCConstantExpr::Create(MO.getOffset(), Ctx),
110 Ctx);
111 return MCOperand::CreateExpr(Expr);
112}
113
114void MSP430MCInstLower::Lower(const MachineInstr *MI, MCInst &OutMI) const {
115 OutMI.setOpcode(MI->getOpcode());
116
117 for (unsigned i = 0, e = MI->getNumOperands(); i != e; ++i) {
118 const MachineOperand &MO = MI->getOperand(i);
119
120 MCOperand MCOp;
121 switch (MO.getType()) {
122 default:
123 MI->dump();
124 llvm_unreachable("unknown operand type");
125 case MachineOperand::MO_Register:
126 // Ignore all implicit register operands.
127 if (MO.isImplicit()) continue;
128 MCOp = MCOperand::CreateReg(MO.getReg());
129 break;
130 case MachineOperand::MO_Immediate:
131 MCOp = MCOperand::CreateImm(MO.getImm());
132 break;
133 case MachineOperand::MO_MachineBasicBlock:
134 MCOp = MCOperand::CreateExpr(MCSymbolRefExpr::Create(
135 MO.getMBB()->getSymbol(), Ctx));
136 break;
137 case MachineOperand::MO_GlobalAddress:
138 MCOp = LowerSymbolOperand(MO, GetGlobalAddressSymbol(MO));
139 break;
140 case MachineOperand::MO_ExternalSymbol:
141 MCOp = LowerSymbolOperand(MO, GetExternalSymbolSymbol(MO));
142 break;
143 case MachineOperand::MO_JumpTableIndex:
144 MCOp = LowerSymbolOperand(MO, GetJumpTableSymbol(MO));
145 break;
146 case MachineOperand::MO_ConstantPoolIndex:
147 MCOp = LowerSymbolOperand(MO, GetConstantPoolIndexSymbol(MO));
148 break;
149 case MachineOperand::MO_BlockAddress:
150 MCOp = LowerSymbolOperand(MO, GetBlockAddressSymbol(MO));
151 break;
152 case MachineOperand::MO_RegisterMask:
153 continue;
154 }
155
156 OutMI.addOperand(MCOp);
157 }
158}
Name
const char * Name
